title: dryopteris adnata
intro: Dryopteris adnata, also known as the autumn fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteridaceae family. The plant is traditionally used in medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris adnata include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
